title: Weekend Brunch — new spring menu
description: Chef Eliott Harris debuts the spring brunch lineup: chorizo avocado benedict, osso buco hash, and seasonal cocktails.

title: Literary Cocktail Night — new spring menu
description: Spring cocktail debut featuring Gravity's Rainbow and Paradise Lost. House-made pasta specials all evening.

title: Fish Fry Fridays
description: Beer battered white fish or Gulf popcorn shrimp with sweet braised onions, whipped potatoes, green beans, and creamy slaw. $21 large / $16 small.

title: Dubai Chocolate Martini — limited seasonal
description: Chocolate vodka, dark chocolate liquor, pistachio ice cream, kataifi. Available while supplies last.

title: Nilla Gorilla returns — imperial porter tapping
description: Imperial vanilla bourbon porter aged in JJ Neukomm oak barrels. 11% ABV. One keg only.

title: Winnie the Pooh spring flavors are here
description: Eeyore's Birthday, Piglet's Red Balloon, Silly Old Bear, and What Tiggers Love Best (non-dairy). In parlors now.

title: Happy Hour daily 3-6pm — half off bottles under $75
description: Wine bottles under $75 are half off, plus $10 Bermuda Triangle frosé and featured small plates.

title: The Drawing Room — private dining available
description: 2,000 sq ft private event space with its own kitchen, bar, and speakeasy-style entrance. Book for groups of 20-80.

title: Sunday brunch — churro cinnamon waffle
description: Cinnamon sugar, chocolate whipped cream. Plus classic and lox benedicts, bacon fried rice, and bottomless brunch cocktails.

title: Easter Brunch Buffet — April 5
description: Omelet & carving station, seafood & salads, breakfast & brunch items, desserts & fruit, soft beverages included.
